symptoms.name: Headache
symptoms.hydration: Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily. Dehydration is one of the most common headache triggers.
nutrition: Avoid processed foods and excess sugar

symptoms.name: Tension Headache
remedies: Apply heat or cold to neck
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle tension and headache frequency.
nutrition: Regular meals to prevent blood sugar drops

symptoms.name: Dizziness
symptoms.hydration: Drink fluids regularly. Dehydration and low blood sugar are common causes of dizziness.

symptoms.name: Migraine
symptoms.hydration: Maintain consistent hydration. Avoid alcohol and excessive caffeine which can trigger migraines.
nutrition: Avoid trigger foods (chocolate, aged cheese, MSG)

symptoms.name: Eye Strain
remedies: 20-20-20 rule (every 20 min, look 20 ft away for 20 sec)
symptoms.hydration: Stay well-hydrated to maintain tear production and eye moisture.

symptoms.name: Dry Eyes
symptoms.hydration: Drink plenty of water to support tear production.

symptoms.name: Watery Eyes
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain proper tear balance.

symptoms.name: Blurred Vision
symptoms.hydration: Adequate hydration supports lens flexibility and overall eye health.

symptoms.name: Earwax Buildup
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain healthy ear wax consistency.
prevention: Use ear drops to soften wax

symptoms.name: Ear Pain
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to thin mucus and promote drainage from ear and sinus passages.

symptoms.name: Tinnitus (Ringing)
symptoms.hydration: Reduce caffeine and alcohol which can worsen tinnitus symptoms.

symptoms.name: Congestion
symptoms.hydration: Drink warm fluids (tea, broth) to thin mucus and promote drainage.

symptoms.name: Runny Nose
symptoms.hydration: Drink plenty of fluids to thin mucus.

symptoms.name: Sneezing
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to keep nasal passages moist.

symptoms.name: Nosebleed
remedies: Apply ice to bridge of nose
symptoms.hydration: Keep nasal passages moist with adequate hydration and humidified air.
nutrition: Vitamin C for blood vessel health

symptoms.name: Mouth Ulcers
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated and avoid acidic drinks that irritate ulcers.

symptoms.name: Bad Breath
symptoms.hydration: Drink water to prevent dry mouth which causes bad breath.

symptoms.name: Dry Mouth
symptoms.hydration: Drink water throughout the day to combat dry mouth.

symptoms.name: Toothache
symptoms.hydration: Rinse mouth with water after eating. Avoid very hot or cold beverages.

symptoms.name: Stiff Neck
symptoms.hydration: Warm herbal teas can help relax tight neck muscles.

symptoms.name: Neck Tension
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle tension and cramping.

symptoms.name: Neck Pain
symptoms.hydration: Proper hydration keeps spinal discs hydrated and maintains flexibility.

symptoms.name: Shoulder Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint flexibility.

symptoms.name: Shoulder Pain
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint lubrication and reduce inflammation.

symptoms.name: Heartburn
symptoms.hydration: Drink water between meals rather than during. Avoid acidic juices.

symptoms.name: Chest Muscle Strain
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to support muscle recovery.

symptoms.name: Chest Tightness
symptoms.hydration: Drink warm water to ease chest tension. Avoid carbonated beverages if GERD-related.

symptoms.name: Bloating
symptoms.hydration: Drink warm water with lemon. Avoid drinking through straws (increases air swallowing).

symptoms.name: Gas
symptoms.hydration: Drink water to help move gas through digestive system.

symptoms.name: Indigestion
symptoms.hydration: Drink water between meals, not during meals.

symptoms.name: Stomach Pain
symptoms.hydration: Sip clear fluids. Avoid dairy and carbonated drinks until symptoms subside.

symptoms.name: Nausea
symptoms.hydration: Take small frequent sips of water or electrolyte drinks. Avoid gulping fluids.

symptoms.name: Back Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to keep spinal discs flexible.

symptoms.name: Muscle Tension
symptoms.hydration: Drink water to reduce muscle cramping and tension.

symptoms.name: Lower Back Pain
remedies: Maintain activity (don't bed rest too long)
symptoms.hydration: Hydration keeps spinal discs plump and shock-absorbing.

symptoms.name: Upper Back Pain
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle cramping and tension.

symptoms.name: Arm Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Arm Pain
symptoms.hydration: Proper hydration reduces muscle cramps and supports recovery.

symptoms.name: Elbow Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint flexibility.

symptoms.name: Tennis Elbow
symptoms.hydration: Maintain hydration for optimal tendon health and elasticity.
prevention: Take regular breaks from repetitive tasks

symptoms.name: Elbow Pain
symptoms.hydration: Adequate fluid intake supports joint cushioning and reduces inflammation.

symptoms.name: Wrist Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Wrist Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint flexibility.

symptoms.name: Carpal Tunnel Syndrome
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce inflammation in the carpal tunnel.

symptoms.name: Wrist Sprain
symptoms.hydration: Proper hydration supports tissue healing and reduces swelling.

symptoms.name: Hand Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Hand Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint flexibility.

symptoms.name: Hand Numbness
symptoms.hydration: Good circulation from hydration helps reduce nerve compression symptoms.

symptoms.name: Joint Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Warm fluids help relax stiff joints. Stay consistently hydrated.

symptoms.name: Finger Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Trigger Finger
symptoms.hydration: Maintain hydration for tendon health and flexibility.

symptoms.name: Hip Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint flexibility.

symptoms.name: Hip Tightness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to keep muscles flexible.

symptoms.name: Hip Pain
symptoms.hydration: Joint hydration is critical — water helps maintain synovial fluid in hip joint.

symptoms.name: Muscle Cramp
symptoms.hydration: Electrolyte-rich drinks are essential. Dehydration is the #1 cause of muscle cramps.

symptoms.name: Thigh Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Hamstring Strain
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated during recovery to support muscle repair.

symptoms.name: Knee Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain joint flexibility.

symptoms.name: Knee Pain
symptoms.hydration: Hydration supports cartilage health and reduces joint inflammation.

symptoms.name: Knee Swelling
symptoms.hydration: Reduce sodium intake and increase water to help manage swelling.

symptoms.name: Leg Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Shin Splints
symptoms.hydration: Maintain good hydration to support muscle function during recovery.

symptoms.name: Leg Swelling
symptoms.hydration: Paradoxically, drinking more water helps reduce fluid retention.

symptoms.name: Ankle Stiffness
symptoms.hydration: Warm fluids before stretching can help improve joint mobility.

symptoms.name: Ankle Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Ankle Sprain
symptoms.hydration: Adequate hydration supports tissue healing and reduces swelling.

symptoms.name: Foot Fatigue
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to reduce muscle fatigue.

symptoms.name: Heel Pain
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain tissue health.

symptoms.name: Plantar Fasciitis
remedies: Rolling foot on frozen water bottle
symptoms.hydration: Stay hydrated to maintain tissue elasticity in the plantar fascia.
prevention: Avoid walking barefoot on hard surfaces

symptoms.name: Foot Numbness
symptoms.hydration: Good blood flow from proper hydration helps with nerve function.
